name: libmoox-handlesvia-perl
title: libmoox-handlesvia-perl
summary: Moose Native Traits-like behavior for Moo
description:
Moose Native Traits-like behavior for Moo
MooX::HandlesVia is an extension of Moo's 'handles' attribute
functionality. It provides a means of proxying functionality from an
external class to the given attribute.
.
This is most commonly used as a way to emulate 'Native Trait'
behavior that is common in Moose code.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libmoox-handlesvia-perl because Moose Native Traits-like behavior for Moo.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libmoox-handlesvia-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libmoox-handlesvia-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libmoox-handlesvia-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
